payload.prompt: Cool. What I thought was that once a user has switched to light/dark mode, it will remain the same until he/she switches again. It will no longer pay attention to system settings. Could you make it a three-way switch, so it would be "Light mode", "Dark mode" or "Follow system settings"? Use the same small icons on buttons, no text (as you did), but add tooltips so that user can see exactly what it is.
